overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt riding a horse through a snowy medieval harbor village at night. The character travels from a forest path into a village center with campfires, continues along wooden waterfront docks, and finally ascends stairs into a stone building.

agents.ego_description: riding horse along forest path toward distant village lights

entered.detail: tall pine trees lining both sides of the forest path
large rocky outcrop alongside the trail
warm orange glow from village fires visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark snowy night in a dense forest. The camera follows Geralt on horseback along a narrow dirt trail, flanked by tall pine trees and stone outcrops. Warm firelight from a distant village glows through the trees ahead, providing the only illumination in the otherwise dark woodland path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor area with central campfire gathering

events.description: exiting forest trail into open village harbor area with large central campfire
slowing and turning right to navigate around the central campfire

agents.ego_description: navigating horse through village center past gathered villagers around large campfire

notable_agents.action: group of villagers gathered around the large campfire
villager walking with torch along the dock

entered.detail: large bonfire with flames and smoke rising, illuminating the village center
tall wooden structure for boat construction
unfinished wooden boat frame with curved ribs

segments.scene_description: The horse emerges from the forest into a wide-open harbor village center. A large bonfire burns brightly in the middle of the clearing, surrounded by villagers. To the right, wooden scaffolding surrounds an unfinished boat skeleton. The camera circles the campfire, revealing stone buildings and wooden docks along the waterfront as snow continues to fall.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock with wooden planks and boats

events.description: moving from village center onto wooden waterfront docks
turning left along the waterfront path near stone walls

agents.ego_description: riding along narrow wooden docks and waterfront paths between stone buildings

notable_agents.action: villager working near stone wall with tools

entered.detail: completed wooden boat moored at the dock
piles of wooden planks and construction materials
tall stone wall lining the waterfront path

segments.scene_description: The horse moves from the village center onto wooden dock planks lining the waterfront. The path narrows between a stone wharf wall and moored wooden boats. The camera passes stacked lumber and construction materials as it follows the dock curve, with the large campfire now visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase leading to stone building entrance

events.description: horse begins ascending wooden stairs toward building entrance
entering stone building interior through wooden doorway

agents.ego_description: riding horse up wooden stairs and entering a stone building

notable_agents.action: villager standing on platform gesturing toward the building

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with railings leading upward
arched stone doorway with warm interior light
glowing interior space visible through the entrance

segments.scene_description: The horse turns toward a stone building and begins ascending a steep wooden staircase. A villager stands on a nearby platform gesturing. The camera follows the ascent, passing torch sconces on the stone walls, and enters the warmly lit interior of the building, leaving the snowy night behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, secluded forest path into the bustling center of a snowy harbor village and finally into a sheltered stone interior. It begins by following Geralt on horseback through a dense woodland of pine trees and stone outcrops, guided by the distant glow of firelight filtering through the dark trees. As the horse emerges from the forest, the scene opens into a wide village clearing dominated by a bright central bonfire and the skeleton of an unfinished boat. The camera then glides from the campfire onto narrow wooden dock planks, passing moored boats and stacked lumber along the waterfront before turning toward a stone building. Finally, the movement ascends a steep wooden staircase past torch-lit walls and enters a warmly lit interior, leaving the falling snow and night behind.
